name: YES BANK RESERV Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: First-year membership fee waived on spending Rs 40,000 within 30 days of card issuance
Renewal fee waiver on spending Rs 3,00,000 in a card anniversary year
8,000 YES Rewardz points on renewal fee realization
additionalBenefits: Card was earlier known as YES First Exclusive
6 complimentary international lounge visits in 12 months for primary and add-on cardmembers
3 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter for primary cardmember
BookMyShow discount up to 25% with monthly cap
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and golf lessons at select golf courses

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
